profiles.displayName: NL PFAS RIVM home-egg PEQ advisory reporting
profiles.aggregationBasis: Relative-potency-weighted sum expressed as PFOA-equivalents for Dutch advisory interpretation when RIVM-supported PFAS analytes are available.
profiles.weightingBasisSummary: Apply governed RIVM relative potency factors to supported PFAS analytes and report the weighted sum as PFOA-equivalents (PEQ).
notes: Optional Dutch advisory profile intended for home-produced egg risk communication and follow-up interpretation, not for EU maximum-level compliance reporting.
Current Dietary MCP PFAS analyte support remains narrower than the full RIVM RPF universe; only supported analytes should be used when this profile is invoked.

profiles.displayName: NL PFAS RIVM PEQ biota and fish advisory reporting
profiles.aggregationBasis: Relative-potency-weighted sum expressed as PFOA-equivalents for Dutch biota and fish-consumption advisory interpretation when RIVM PEQ Tool V3 context is the governing convention.
profiles.weightingBasisSummary: Apply governed RIVM relative potency factors to supported PFAS analytes and report the weighted sum as PFOA-equivalents (PEQ) for fish and biota advisory interpretation.
notes: Optional Dutch advisory profile intended for fish and biota follow-up interpretation when RIVM PEQ Tool V3 is the governing reference.
Current Dietary MCP PFAS analyte support remains narrower than the full RIVM PEQ Tool analyte universe; only supported analytes should be used when this profile is invoked.
